summary: Create an electronics website named "Uttah Electronics" with 3D animations for the website experience.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Wordmark logo reading "Uttah Electronics" with a clean modern tech aesthetic (uttah-electronics-logo.dim_1024x256.png)
- Square favicon icon with a simple electronics-themed mark (uttah-electronics-favicon.dim_256x256.png)
- Abstract dark electronics/circuit pattern background texture (uttah-electronics-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)

existing_features.title: Create a responsive electronics company website named "Uttah Electronics" with a complete landing-page style structure (top navigation + key sections) suitable for a small brand presence.
Add coherent site sections for an electronics brand: Hero, Featured Categories, Featured Products (static sample catalog), About, and Contact.
Implement 3D animations on the website using Three.js via React Three Fiber: include a 3D hero scene and at least one additional animated 3D element/section transition effect.

Define and apply a consistent visual theme (colors, typography, spacing, component style) across the entire site with a distinct non-blue/non-purple aesthetic appropriate for a modern electronics brand.

new_feature_requests.summary: Build an electronics website for "Uttah Electronics"
